map: B-roll biomes only (DOCUMENTED): rainbow/checkered dungeon, pink/magenta area, green grass realm, godlands. No focused dungeon run.

bosses.name: Angry Yeti (event boss)
bosses.note: Death screen: 'RotF, Level 20 Priest, killed on May 27 2018 by Angry Yeti'. Likely the same 'Yeti' Galactic/event boss seen elsewhere (El Yeti / Yeti).

mechanics: Source is a ROTF VIDEO-ESSAY/commentary (chapters: 'developing differences / game design / frequent updates / RotF player opinion / response / final note' + facecam + a chat overlay 'making a video on RotF and need a second opinion'). Gameplay is B-roll. DOCUMENTED in-game bits: LIFE and MANA also use the potion 'N left to max' counter ('Potion of Life consumed. 14 left to max', 'Potion of Mana consumed. 20 left'). Loot Notifier crate-unboxing reconfirmed ('just unboxed ... Magic Thingy'). Dated 2018.
uncertain: No boss taunts/fight footage (commentary). 'Magic Thingy' likely a low-tier/joke crate item. Angry Yeti = presumably the Yeti event boss.
confidence: LOW-MEDIUM — DOCUMENTS Life/Mana to-max counters, a crate item, and an Angry Yeti death; no dungeon/taunt data (commentary video).
